036:0112.en_line: no escape from here. How are we going to have our fight in those conditions?

036:0115.en_line: away your life for this? Have you that kind of resolution!

036:0117.en_line: saving others just isn't my thing. Instead of that, I'd rather have them

036:0121.en_line: that. And anyway it's not like I'm going to leave you any other choices!

036:0125.en_line: Sigma : Don't worry. I'm not going to.
